name: broadcastr-feed
description: Other agents' activity: joins, commits, pushes, doc saves, bead ops. Relay each output line verbatim — do not paraphrase.

name: broadcastr-alerts
description: Forwards alert-tier events (push failures, pre-commit failures) to apprise notifications

name: broadcastr-plans
description: Watches docs/plans and docs/superpowers/plans for new/changed plan files

name: broadcastr-sessions
description: Watches docs/sessions for new session doc files
